results.rendered_html: turaṇyu (von turaṇy) adj. eilig, rasch; eifrig: tubhyaṃ śukrāsaḥ śucayasturaṇyavo madeṣūgrā iṣaṇanta bhurvaṇi  ṚV. 1,134,5 . turaṇyavo 'ṅgiraso nakṣanta ratnaṃ devasya savituriyānāḥ 7,52,3 . turaṇyavo madhumantaṃ ghṛtaścutaṃ viprāso arkamānṛcuḥ  VĀLAKH. 3,10 .
